title: Lesser & Pavey LP42480A Little Stars Vehicles Plate
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES 1 Piece Vehicle Plate | 22x22x2 cm
COLORFUL DESIGN: This adorable Plate features different Cars that will surely add excitement and pleasure to mealtime for your little boys.
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: This adorable Plate makes a wonderful present for little boys for any occasion. Best paired with Beaker, soup bowl, food tray and Cutlery set with the same design.
HIGH QUALITY: This adorable plate is made of Premium quality Plastic. It is lightweight but still very durable and 100% food-safe for children's use.
SAFE FOR KIDS: This adorable plate is reusable and BPA-free making it safe for kids' meals.
description: Product Description This adorable plate features different Cars in a Bright and colorful design that will surely add excitement and pleasure to mealtime for your little boys and makes a wonderful present for little boys for any occasion.
